title: Mounting method and apparatus
abstract: BATHROOM FITTING The invention provides a method of and apparatus for, mounting a bathroom fitting, particularly a shower screen or shower enclosure. In one aspect the invention provides fixing units having internal adjustment so that, when used to mount a base member on a wall, the vertical alignment of the base member can be established without the need to drill further mounting holes. The invention also provides a means for physically supporting a screen on a mounted base member so that the position of the screen or enclosure member can be adjusted into the desired position, while being supported, before final fixing.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. Mounting apparatus for a bathroom fitting said apparatus including a base member for fitment to a substantially vertical wall, said base member having a length and a width wherein said length is greater than said width; and a plurality of fixing units each of which is engageable with and adjustably positionable along said length to, in use, fix said base member to said wall along a fixing axis, said mounting apparatus being characterised in that at least one of said fixing units includes a manipulation facility configured such that, when engaged with said base member, displacement of said manipulation facility effects displacement of said base member relative to said fixing unit axis in the direction of said width. 2. Mounting apparatus as claimed in claim 1 wherein, when assembled together, said fixing units are accommodated within the width of said base member. 3. Mounting apparatus as claimed in claim 1 or claim 2 wherein said at least one fixing unit comprises a body and a peg rotatable within said body about a peg axis, said fixing axis passing through said peg at a position offset from said peg axis. 4. Mounting apparatus as claimed in any one of claims 1 to 3 wherein said base member comprises two side walls connected by a cross-member and wherein a slot is provided in said cross-member in the direction of the length of said base member. 5. Mounting apparatus as claimed in claim 4 wherein each fixing unit includes a spigot configured as a close sliding fit within said slot. 6. Mounting apparatus as claimed in any one of claims 1 to 5 further including an attachment member engageable with said base member, said attachment member being configured to mount a planar screen or enclosure member. 

 A shower screen or enclosure kitset including mounting apparatus as claimed claim 6 and a screen or enclosure member formed from planar sheet material engageable with said attachment member. 8. A method of installing a shower screen or enclosure which includes a base member mountable on a wall; an attachment member fixed to a screen or enclosure member, said attachment member being engageable with said base member, said method including fixing said base member to a wall, using a clipping facility to temporarily engage said attachment member to said base member in a manner that allows some degree of movement there-between and so that said attachment member is supported by said base member; adjusting the position of said attachment member relative to said base member until a desired position has been achieved; and fixing said attachment member to said base member. A method as claimed in claim 8 wherein said base member and said attachment member have locating points thereon, said method comprising applying a clipping facility between said locating points to effect a temporary connection between said attachment member and said base member. 10. A method as claimed in claim 8 or claim 9 further including adjusting the vertical alignment of said base member on said wall. 11. Shower screen or enclosure apparatus including a base member fixable to a wall; an attachment member attachable to a screen or enclosure member and engageable with said base member, said apparatus being characterised in that said base member and said attachment member are provided with locating points, said apparatus further including a clipping facility engageable between said locating points in a manner such that said attachment member can be moved with respect to said base member while being supported by said base member. 12. Shower screen or enclosure apparatus as claimed in claim 11 wherein said locating points comprise a plurality of apertures or cut-outs. 

 Shower screen or enclosure apparatus as claimed in claim 12 wherein said base member includes an inverted substantially T-shaped aperture and said attachment member includes a substantially vertical slot. Shower screen or enclosure apparatus as claimed in any one of claims 11 to 13 wherein said locating points are provided on sidewalls of said base member and said attachment member respectively. Shower screen or enclosure apparatus as claimed in any one of claims 11 to 14 further including a screen attached to said attachment member. Shower screen or enclosure apparatus as claimed in any one of claims 11 to 15 further including a plurality of fixing units constructed and arranged to fix said base member to a wall. Shower screen or enclosure apparatus as claimed in claim 16 wherein at least one of said fixing units has a fixing axis, the position of which is adjustable within said fixing unit. A fixing unit forming part of an apparatus as claimed in any one of claims 1 to 5, said fixing unit having a body and a fixing axis and being characterised in that a position of said fixing axis is adjustable within said body.
